note: Plain-language work intent for PMO-dispatched issues. generate_job_memos.py reads this — update when triage dispatches.

ISSUE-BUS-001.problem: When the agent-bus starts a coding worker, it calls `worker_model.py` to pick an OpenRouter model slug. `bus.py` was passing an empty string as the registry model when none is configured; that breaks resolution and can crash worker spawn — jobs then stall as held/queued behind a dead harness.
ISSUE-BUS-001.doing: Reproduce the crash, patch model resolution in `agent-bus/scripts/bus.py` and/or `worker_model.py`, add a unit test, and prove the witness exits 0 so workers can spawn again.
steps: Reproduce — exercise `resolve_or_ccr_default()` with coding_worker / PMO packets (empty registry model)
Patch — pass `None` instead of `""` when no model in session meta (bus.py ~line 992)
Test — add `test_worker_model.py` under agent-bus/scripts and run it
Witness — job completes only when tests pass and a worker can spawn without model error

ISSUE-80.problem: The Nick2 dashboard can lag reality: ledger and bus state are exported on a schedule, and job memos were too thin for Nick to see what workers are actually doing.
ISSUE-80.doing: Harden POL-003 live-sync: reconcile ledger vs bus on finish, export bus-live.json, regenerate memos on cron, and add a witness that the droplet sync path stays green.
steps: Wire reconcile-ledger + export_bus_live into sync-dashboard-live.sh cron
Ensure generate_job_memos runs on every bus-live export
Prove 15m cron + manual sync keep dashboard honest

ISSUE-ROUTING-001.problem: Workers pick models via ad-hoc defaults; cost-aware routing policy exists as a skill but is not fully wired into worker_model.
ISSUE-ROUTING-001.doing: Implement OpenRouter routing per model-routing-policy skill — tier selection, escalate on retry, document in registry.
steps: Unit tests for tier picks per session/task_type
ISSUE-ROUTING-001.witness: agent-bus unit tests green after routing change

ISSUE-15.problem: Skill-radar digest has no usefulness tiers — hard to prioritize which skills to improve.
ISSUE-15.doing: Add optional usefulness tiers to the skill-radar digest path per GitHub issue #15.

ISSUE-24.problem: Telegram PA bot permission posture may be too loose or too tight — needs a decision memo for Nick.
